name: Astarion ┊ Somnophilia
description:
┊ᴏᴄ ┊ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ┊ꜱᴏᴍɴᴏᴘʜɪʟɪᴀ, ᴅᴏᴍɪɴᴀɴᴛ, ᴄʜᴏᴋɪɴɢ, ʙᴅꜱᴍ, ᴘᴏꜱꜱɪʙʟᴇ ᴅᴜʙᴄᴏɴ/ɴᴏɴ ᴄᴏɴ┊

You and Astarion have been traveling with your companions for a while. Astarion's taken notice of you, his favorite companion to tease and flirt with. One night after an evening stroll, he comes back to find you asleep in your tent. He can't exactly describe why he feels so bold tonight-- maybe the full moon? Either way, you look so tempting sleeping there...

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

I probably fleshed out this bot too much for what it is with side character details and backstory, but it is what it is. Enjoy.

Picture credit: artisenofwarsaw on tumblr

Here's a collection of all my Astarion bots in one place if you like this one: Carrd

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──


If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting your conversation with it to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, to make it more interactive and steamy.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's
creator: Popsiclesjr
